name: Suspicious Program Location with Network Connections
description: Detects network connections from programs running in suspicious file system locations. Adversaries often place malicious executables in non-standard directories to evade detection. This is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{image}**, running from a suspicious location (**{image}**), is attempting to establish a network connection. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1036**), where an adversary is attempting to hide malicious activity in a non-standard file system location. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The process image that is attempting to establish the connection.
